UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION SET ON MAR-19-2014 IN DEPT. 501: DEFENDANTS DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG AND JEAN FONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 18, 2014. MOVING PARTY AND ITS COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN MARCH 31, 2014 WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-18-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND OVERRULING IN PART DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-24-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG AND JEAN FONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER IS BROUGHT BY KOBUCHI, MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG AND JEAN FONG IDENTIFIED AS THE "BENEFICIARIES OF THE TRUST." (DEMURRER 4:11). MOVING PARTIES DO NOT PURPORT TO BE DOE 1, AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST. DEMURRER TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED AGAINST DOE1 ONLY (1, 2, 6 AND 7) IS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NON-OPPOSITION FILED. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE "ACTUAL DISRUPTION OF THE RELATIONSHIP" CAUSED BY INTENTIONAL ACTS OF MOVING DEFENDANTS. DEMURER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: DUTY AND BREACH OF DUTY AS TO MOVING DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS JEAN FONG, WILBERT FONG, DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY SHIFTED THE BURDEN. OPPOSING PARTY FAILED TO PRODUCE ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. ALSO, PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO THE SEPARATE STATEMENT IS DEFECTIVE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David J. Foran, Esq. (415-775-0891), for Doris Kobuchi, Anna McCarthy, Shirley Fong, Jean Fong and Wilbert Fong, Defendants and moving parties.
Ted Feldman, (415-305-4216), Plaintiff in pro per and opposing party, APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL.

Court hears the arguments from Ted Feldman, Plaintiff and opposing party. Plaintiff claims that Defendant or its counsel never returned plaintiff's phone calls and emails, which leads to Plaintiff's incurring costs during the litigation.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling with modification as follows: DEFENDANTs DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG, JEAN FONG and WILBERT FONG's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is GRANTED. Defendants shall recover $25,575.00 in attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $4,035.94 per Memorandum of Costs. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication By Defendants
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David J. Foran, Esq. of Sacramento and Foran, (415-775-1350), Defendants and moving parties.
Ted Feldman, Plaintiff in pro per, (415-305-4216), opposing party, APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs JEAN FONG, WILBERT FONG, DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted the burden. Opposing party failed to produce admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Also, Plaintiff's response to the Separate Statement is defective. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Pat Miller, Esq. of Stuhr & Miller LLP (415-585-2122) is present for plaintiff/opposing partyDavid J. Foran, Esq. of Sacramento and Foran (415-775-0891) is present for defendants/demurring parties

Court hears arguments from both sides re DEFENDANTS DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG, JEAN FONG and WILBERT FONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Court rules now as follows:

The demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part as follows:

Defendant's demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the breach of contract cause of action. Plaintiff must attach a copy of the alleged contract to the complaint.

The demurrer is OVERRULED as to the second cause of action for Breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing. Plaintiff has presented sufficient fact. The statute of limitations does not bar this cause of action.

The demurrer is OVERRULED as to the third cause of action for fraud. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts regarding the elements of fraud.

The demurrer is OVERRULED as to the fourth cause of action for Intentional Interference with Contractual Relationship. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts regarding the breach.

The demurrer is OVERRULED as to the fifth cause of action for Negligence. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled facts regarding Defendant's duty.

The demurrer is OVERRULED as to the sixth cause of action for specific performance. The terms of this contract are sufficiently certain and clearly ascertainable.

Written order is signed and filed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Continued To Jul-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Foran, Esq. attorney at law (415-775-0891) for Doris Kobuchi, et al Defendants and moving parties.
Robert M. Sellards, Esq. of Stuhr & Miller, LLP (415-585-2122) for Ted Feldman Plaintiff and opposing party.

The court adopts the tentative rulings as follows: DEFENDANTs DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG and JEAN FONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is brought by Kobuchi, McCarthy, Shirley Fong and Jean Fong identified as the "beneficiaries of the Trust." (Demurrer 4:11). Moving parties do not purport to be Doe 1, as trustee of the Trust. Demurrer to all causes of action alleged against Doe1 only (1, 2, 6 and 7) is OVERRULED.
Demurrer to 3rd cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer to 4th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege "actual disruption of the relationship" caused by intentional acts of moving defendants. Demurer to the 5th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: duty and breach of duty as to moving defendants. Order signed after hearing. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: Bertha Paredes; Not reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To Apr-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on Wednesday, March 19, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG and JEAN FONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to April 18, 2014. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than March 31, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)
